MLAമാരുടെ സത്യപ്രതിജ്ഞ.\n\nA new era has dawned in Kerala as Shri V.D. Satheesan officially took the oath of office as the Chief Minister. Along with him, a full cabinet of 20 ministers was also sworn in.
